Key implementation details (if non-obvious).

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run build` passes
- [ ] `npm run lint` passes
- [ ] i18n: both `en.json` and `zh.json` updated (if UI text changed)
- [ ] Follows design system in `DESIGN.md` (if UI changed)
- [ ] Tested in both light and dark mode (if UI changed)
